About Heity Store 🧂🖤

Heity Store is Pakistan's trusted online store for premium snacks and fragrances. We deliver authentic, fresh, and high-quality products directly to your home — at fair prices.

From freshly made Nimko to 100% original Fogg perfumes, every product is carefully selected. We believe in building trust — one delivery at a time.

💛
100% Trust
Every product verified & authentic
🚀
Fast Delivery
Pakistan-wide in 24–48 hours
💰
Cash on Delivery
Pay only when you receive
🌟
Customer First
Your satisfaction is our goal
